title: MikroTik MT48-570080-11DG, power adapter 57V 0.8A, 45.6W, GPEN
description: Power adapter with output voltage 57V DC, maximum current 0.8A, total output power 45,6W and connector 5.5 / 2.1mm. The power source is part of the MikroTik GPEN concept, which provides all the benefits of GPON GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form .
